TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tatoba' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 407 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 360 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 47 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 60%, saySiyat 27%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tatoba' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tatoba' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tatoba' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tatoba' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tatoba' hya' ga Kahaehaeoan. tay 'llaw na Tatoba' hya' ga Takunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tatoβaʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa kaħaeħaeoan. taj ʔllaw na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa takunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tatoba' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 159 buwan, 407 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 360 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 47 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 60%, saySiyat 27%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tatoba' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tatoba' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tatoba' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tatoba' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Tatoba' hya' ga Kahaehaeoan. tay 'llaw na Tatoba' hya' ga Takunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 3 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tatoβaʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa kaħaeħaeoan. taj ʔllaw na tatoβaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa takunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
